case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KIMBERLY FULGHAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FULGHAM, KIMBERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2508 GRIFFITH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124; COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELLED***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS NO SASE; CONFORMED COPY IN DEPT. 501'S OUTBOX.(SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT FULGHAM, KIMBERLY
DECLARATION OF OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.16 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FULGHAM, KIMBERLY
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT FULGHAM, KIMBERLY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT FULGHAM, KIMBERLY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-18-2015, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT FULGHAM, KIMBERLY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-18-2015, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FULGHAM, KIMBERLY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT FULGHAM, KIMBERLY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FULGHAM, KIMBERLY
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
